Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major urban area in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and infrastructure development. It is one of the fastest-growing cities in the country and serves as a hub for business and industry. The city is home to several key institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Lagos State Government. Lekki is also a popular destination for both residents and tourists due to its natural beauty and recreational facilities.
